title: Stripe Issuing
excerpt: Use the Stripe Issuing API to create, manage, and distribute payment cards for your business. Issuing is available in the United States, United Kingdom, and European Economic Area. Stablecoin-backed card programs are also available in more than 30 countries across Latin America, the Caribbean, and Africa. Learn more about [availability by country](https://docs.stripe.com/issuing/global.md). [Stripe Issuing](https://dashboard.stripe.com/issuing/overview) allows you to create a commercial card program for your users without setup fees. You can create your own card designs, and approve transactions in real time.…
